seo.title: CSS Gradient Generator | Creative Lab
seo.description: Create linear, radial and conic CSS gradients with multiple colors.

product.title: Gradient Generator
product.description: Design linear, radial and conic gradients with multiple colors, precise controls and ready-to-use CSS.

generator.title: Design your gradient
generator.intro: Choose the gradient type, adjust its colors and copy the result.
generator.stopsDescription: Add up to eight colors and define their position within the gradient.
generator.previewDescription: The result updates in real time.
generator.previewText: Design backgrounds with depth and movement.
generator.codeDescription: Copy the generated background and use it in your project.

info.title: How to create a gradient with Creative Lab
info.description: Select the gradient type, adjust its colors and positions, review the preview and copy the CSS code.
info.stepOneText: Select a linear, radial or conic gradient.
info.stepTwoText: Modify colors, positions, angle and center.
info.stepThreeText: Copy the CSS or download a PNG image.
